title: Alameda Museum – Preserving Alameda’s History since 1948
content: ALAMEDA MUSEUM & MEYERS HOUSE   Preserve and celebrate the colorful past of this unique island city Show Support. Alameda is a unique island community located in the heart of the San Francisco Bay Area. We offer permanent displays of Alameda history as well as souvenirs, books and videos about the rich history of the Island City. ### Please consider joining the Museum and help preserve and celebrate the colorful past of this unique island city. ## The Alameda Museum offers a deep dive into the vibrant history of Alameda, featuring permanent displays, unique souvenirs, and a collection of books and videos that celebrate the Island City's storied past. Founded in 1948, the Alameda Museum has been a cornerstone of historical preservation in the community, showcasing the city's evolution and heritage. Since 1983, the museum has served as the official keeper of Alameda's historical documents and artifacts, safeguarding the memories and milestones of the Island City.
